label: sandbox • compute a sum in a script, pin the stdout
query: In your sandbox home, write a Python script sum.py that prints the sum of the integers 1 through 10 (the single number, nothing else). Run it with sandbox_exec, then write the exact stdout to sum_out.txt in your home directory. Read it back to verify before finishing.
notes: Coding-ability floor for the sandbox lane: author with sandbox_write_file, execute with sandbox_exec, act on real stdout. The output (55) is pinned via the VirtioFS host mount so a hallucinated 'I ran it' cannot pass. SKIPS automatically without a working sandbox VM.
